task.summary: Default task
Interface work, cleaning code around.
First moving common code for projectile base class.

Finished the black hole project. I was able to set the radial force component to ignore Pawn by using the "RemoveObjectTypeAffected" function by using the EngineType "ConvertToObjectType" function.
Proud of this one. Looks good.
Changed to 5 second timer for black hole.
HUD and ActionSystemComponent changes to broadcast to death event.
Fixing black hole default responsed
Fixed now
Fixing collision profiles to work better. Black hole custom cuz its a special projectile
More profile changes
Using CVars for toggling debugs
Implemented HealthMax to Action Component. Next is to create the health pick up and its parent class ItemBase
Added the pickup sound for health pick up item
Finished Pickup Assignment 3
Touching ai and eqs
Halfway Done with Assignment 4
Finished ai part.
Refactored everything using the action system.
Sprint Action created and converted RogueActions to be implementable in blueprint.
Using actions blueprints to make new actions.
Adding gameplay tags instead of FNames
tag ini
Applying tags
Learned about making our own binding using UObject in order to make new event listeners which we used to update health this time with the rogueaction system gameplay tags that have been set up.
Move speed attribute and alot of code to make attributes more versatile in action system.

MESSAGE.value: First moving common code for projectile base class.

Finished the black hole project. I was able to set the radial force component to ignore Pawn by using the "RemoveObjectTypeAffected" function by using the EngineType "ConvertToObjectType" function.
Proud of this one. Looks good.
Changed to 5 second timer for black hole.
HUD and ActionSystemComponent changes to broadcast to death event.
Fixing black hole default responsed
Fixed now
Fixing collision profiles to work better. Black hole custom cuz its a special projectile
More profile changes
Using CVars for toggling debugs
Implemented HealthMax to Action Component. Next is to create the health pick up and its parent class ItemBase
Added the pickup sound for health pick up item
Finished Pickup Assignment 3
Touching ai and eqs
Halfway Done with Assignment 4
Finished ai part.
Refactored everything using the action system.
Sprint Action created and converted RogueActions to be implementable in blueprint.
Using actions blueprints to make new actions.
Adding gameplay tags instead of FNames
tag ini
Applying tags
Learned about making our own binding using UObject in order to make new event listeners which we used to update health this time with the rogueaction system gameplay tags that have been set up.
Move speed attribute and alot of code to make attributes more versatile in action system.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Move speed attribute and alot of code to make attributes more versatile in action system.
